rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAYMOND MATTHEWS JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/03/2026. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) The underlying petition has not been updated to correct the value of the estate's partial interest in the real property. 2) Please provide authority for the request to waive statutory fees in this estate on the condition that they are collected in the related estate. Is petitioner and counsel for petitioner seeking approval in this estate to collect in the related estate if and when the property is sold? Please clarify the request. 3) The response to examiner's notes alludes to an updated proposed order having been lodged, but no such document has been lodged with the court. Please address the above issues and deliver courtesy copies of all futher filings to this examiner no later than 02/17/2026 to avoid additional continuance.
